mapper.sql: ID AS id, ORDER_ID AS orderId, ORDER_NO AS orderNo, PAYMENT_ID AS paymentId, PAYMENT_STATUS AS paymentStatus, TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount, CURRENCY AS currency, PAID_TM AS paidTm, CANCELLED_TM AS cancelledTm, CANCEL_AMOUNT AS cancelAmount, FAIL_REASON AS failReason, DEL_YN AS delYn, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPT_TM AS uptTm

ID AS id, PAYMENT_ID AS paymentId, PAY_TYPE AS payType, PAY_METHOD AS payMethod, AMOUNT AS amount, PG_PROVIDER AS pgProvider, PG_TID AS pgTid, PORTONE_PAYMENT_ID AS portonePaymentId, APPROVED_TM AS approvedTm, CANCELLED_TM AS cancelledTm, CANCEL_AMOUNT AS cancelAmount, FAIL_REASON AS failReason, RAW_RESPONSE AS rawResponse, DEL_YN AS delYn, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPT_TM AS uptTm
mapper.insert: /* Payment.insertPayment */ INSERT INTO TB_PAYMENT ( ORDER_ID, ORDER_NO, PAYMENT_ID, PAYMENT_STATUS, TOTAL_AMOUNT, CURRENCY, PAID_TM, CANCEL_AMOUNT, DEL_YN, CRE_TM, UPT_TM ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{paymentId}, COALESCE(#{paymentStatus}, 'R'), COALESCE(#{totalAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{currency}, 'KRW'), CASE WHEN COALESCE(#{paymentStatus}, 'R') = 'P' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END, COALESCE(#{cancelAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{delYn}, 'N'), NOW(), NOW() )

/* Payment.insertPaymentDet */ INSERT INTO TB_PAYMENT_DET ( PAYMENT_ID, PAY_TYPE, PAY_METHOD, AMOUNT, PG_PROVIDER, PG_TID, PORTONE_PAYMENT_ID, APPROVED_TM, RAW_RESPONSE, CANCEL_AMOUNT, DEL_YN, CRE_TM, UPT_TM ) VALUES ( #{paymentId}, #{payType}, #{payMethod}, COALESCE(#{amount}, 0), #{pgProvider}, #{pgTid}, #{portonePaymentId}, NOW(), #{rawResponse}::jsonb, COALESCE(#{cancelAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{delYn}, 'N'), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select:
/* Payment.selectPaymentByOrderNo */ SELECT
FROM TB_PAYMENT WHERE ORDER_NO = #{orderNo} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY ID DESC LIMIT 1

/* Payment.selectPaymentListBySocialAccountId */ SELECT P.ID AS paymentSeq, O.ID AS orderId, O.ORDER_NO AS orderNo, O.SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID AS socialAccountId, O.ORDER_STATUS AS orderStatus, FN_GET_CODE('10100', O.ORDER_STATUS) AS orderStatusNm, P.PAYMENT_ID AS paymentId, P.PAYMENT_STATUS AS paymentStatus, FN_GET_CODE('10070', P.PAYMENT_STATUS) AS paymentStatusNm, P.TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount, O.USED_POINT AS usedPoint, O.PAYMENT_AMOUNT AS paymentAmount, O.EARNED_POINT AS earnedPoint, P.CURRENCY AS currency, P.PAID_TM AS paidTm, P.CRE_TM AS creTm, OD.RECEIVER_NAME AS receiverName, OD.RECEIVER_PHONE AS receiverPhone, OD.ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, OD.ADDRESS AS address, OD.ADDRESS_DETAIL AS addressDetail, OD.DELIVERY_STATUS AS deliveryStatus, FN_GET_CODE('10110', OD.DELIVERY_STATUS) AS deliveryStatusNm, OD.DELIVERY_COMPANY AS deliveryCompany, OD.INVOICE_NO AS invoiceNo FROM TB_PAYMENT P JOIN TB_ORDER O ON O.ID = P.ORDER_ID JOIN TB_ORDER_DELIVERY OD ON OD.ORDER_ID = O.ID AND OD.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE O.SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID = #{socialAccountId} AND P.DEL_YN = 'N' AND COALESCE(P.PAID_TM, P.CRE_TM) >= #{fromDateTime} AND COALESCE(P.PAID_TM, P.CRE_TM) < #{toDateTime} ORDER BY P.ID DESC
mapper.update: /* Payment.updatePaymentStatus */ UPDATE TB_PAYMENT SET PAYMENT_STATUS = #{paymentStatus}, FAIL_REASON = #{failReason}, PAID_TM = CASE WHEN #{paymentStatus} = 'P' THEN NOW() ELSE PAID_TM END, UPT_TM = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id} AND DEL_YN = 'N'

/* Payment.updatePaymentDetStatus */ UPDATE TB_PAYMENT_DET SET PG_TID = #{pgTid}, PORTONE_PAYMENT_ID = #{portonePaymentId}, FAIL_REASON = #{failReason}, RAW_RESPONSE = #{rawResponse}::jsonb, APPROVED_TM = COALESCE(APPROVED_TM, NOW()), UPT_TM = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id} AND DEL_YN = 'N'

/* Payment.updatePaymentCancel */ UPDATE TB_PAYMENT SET PAYMENT_STATUS = 'C', CANCEL_AMOUNT = COALESCE(#{cancelAmount}, CANCEL_AMOUNT), CANCELLED_TM = NOW(), UPT_TM = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
/* Payment.updatePaymentDetCancel */ UPDATE TB_PAYMENT_DET SET CANCEL_AMOUNT = COALESCE(#{cancelAmount}, CANCEL_AMOUNT), CANCELLED_TM = NOW(), UPT_TM = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
